debug_info.goal:
x y z : ℝ
h₀ : 0 ≤ x ∧ 0 ≤ y ∧ 0 ≤ z
h₁ : x + y + z = 1
⊢ 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ∧ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27

proof:
have h₂ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
  have h₃ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
  have h₄ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
  have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by nlinarith
  constructor
  · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x)]
  ·
    cases' le_total x y with hxy hxy <;> cases' le_total y z with hyz hyz <;>
      cases' le_total z x with hzx hzx <;>
        simp_all only [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] <;>
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - 1 / 3), sq_nonneg (y - 1 / 3), sq_nonneg (z - 1 / 3)]
